findings.issue: No error handling for missing fixture file in loadFixtureApps.
findings.fix: Wrap readFileSync in try/catch and return empty array on failure.

findings.issue: POST /api/refresh does not validate request body or mode parameter.
findings.fix: Add validation for mode parameter to accept only 'fixture' or 'live-smoke'.

findings.issue: No CORS headers on API responses; may block cross-origin requests.
findings.fix: Add 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *' header to all API responses.

suggested_next_steps: Add error handling for fixture file loading
Add CORS headers for broader compatibility
